Fig. 8. CCPN had protective effect on the pneumonia model of mice caused by MRSA. A: Survival rate of mice; B: Weight changes of mice; C: Lung and spleen
dimensions of mice; D: Total cell count in BALF; E: MRSA load in the lungs. The data are expressed as the mean ± SEM, P values are determined by one-way ANOVA.
